items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the 'First-time customer only' requirement, but the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or confirmations related to this requirement. The prior steps focus on booking confirmations and other aspects of the system, but do not address the specific need for validating first-time customer discounts. Therefore, the evidence is insufficient to assert a definitive conclusion regarding this requirement.
